news.headline: Sheriff in Tennessee probes theft of 80,000 lbs of beef loaded onto trucks but never delivered from slaughterhouse.
news.summary: Authorities in Grainger County, Tennessee, are currently looking into a case of theft involving shipments from a meat processing facility. The sheriff’s office has reported that the items were loaded onto trucks but failed to arrive at their intended locations. The exact number of shipments and the value of the stolen goods are currently under investigation.

news.headline: Elon Musk's xAI company buys X for $33 billion, he confirms reported.
Rupert Resources releases audited financial results for the ten months ending Dec 31, 2024. Toronto, March 28, 2025.
news.summary: Toronto, March 28, 2025 - Rupert Resources Ltd, a company based in Toronto, has released its audited financial report for the ten-month period concluding on December 31, 2024. The report includes the Management's Discussion and Analysis for the same period. This update provides stakeholders and investors with key insights into the company's financial performance over this period.

news.headline: Condado Tacos offers half-off burritos and free delivery for the first time, celebrating National Burrito Day.
news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio, on March 28, 2025, Condado Tacos is gearing up for a sizzling celebration on National Burrito Day. Making a notable entry into the burrito scene, the restaurant is offering a special deal: every burrito will be available at a discount of 50% on Thursday, April 3. This promotion is a first-time occurrence for Condado, promising customers an exciting and flavorful experience at a fraction of the usual cost.

news.headline: Premium Global Income Split Corp. reports $0.30 million increase in net assets, $7.52 million total; $0.64 per Preferred share cash distribution in 2024.
news.summary: Premium Global Income Split Corp. (TSX: PGIC; PGIC.PR.A) based in Toronto released its financial results for the year ending on December 31, 2024. The net assets attributable to Class A shareholders saw an increase of $0.30 million, translating to $0.36 per Class A share. As of the end of the year, the net assets for Class A shareholders stood at $7.52 million, equivalent to $7.31 per Class A share. Throughout the year, cash distributions of $0.64 per Preferred share and $0.48 per Class A share were disbursed.

news.headline: Mulvihill Canadian Bank Enhanced Yield ETF's net assets grow to $122.66 million, $27.25 million increase in 2024. Distributions: $9.65 million.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, the Mulvihill Canadian Bank Enhanced Yield ETF (TSX: CBNK) released its financial results for the year ending December 31, 2024. The net assets attributable to unit holders saw an increase of $27.25 million, equivalent to $2.00 per unit. As of December 31, 2024, the net assets attributable to unit holders totaled $122.66 million, which translates to $8.43 per unit. Throughout the year, cash distributions to unitholders reached $9.65 million, or $0.70 per unit.

news.headline: Largo's 2024 financial results announced, with plans for operational turnaround and cost optimization.
news.summary: Toronto-based company Largo announced their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company revealed a strategic operational turnaround plan and introduced further cost optimization initiatives. This move comes in the wake of challenges faced in the previous year. Largo aims to strengthen its position in the market as it reported significant numbers for the mentioned period. The company's focus on green steel and sustainability will be central to its future endeavors.

news.headline: EpicCyber partners with TD SYNNEX to offer Zscaler services to Value-Add Resellers, enhancing enterprise solutions.
news.summary: A partnership has been announced between EpicCyber, a prominent provider of Zscaler deployment and operational services based in Mill Valley, California, and TD SYNNEX. The collaboration aims to bring enterprise-level Zscaler solutions and services to the Value-Add Resellers within their network. The partnership was established on March 28, 2025, and is designed to enhance the capabilities of the Value-Add Resellers by leveraging the expertise of EpicCyber in Zscaler technologies.

news.summary: A new report in the field of technology reveals that global spending on cybersecurity products and services is expected to reach $174 billion by the end of this year. This marks an increase of 12% from the previous year, highlighting the growing importance of cybersecurity in today's digital world. The report also indicates that organizations are prioritizing investment in areas such as security operations, identity access management, and vulnerability assessment. With cyber threats becoming more sophisticated, companies are ramping up their efforts to protect their data and systems. The Asia-Pacific region is projected to see the highest growth in cybersecurity spending, followed by North America and Europe. Experts emphasize the need for businesses to stay vigilant and proactive in safeguarding their assets against cyber attacks.

news.headline: Appeals court overturns Dogecoin limits at aid agency amid Musk dispute.
Girl associated with Hawk Tuah claims SEC will cease investigation on Meme Coin.
news.summary: Ten million people in the United States have filed for unemployment benefits in the last two weeks, marking a record-breaking surge in job losses due to the coronavirus pandemic. The sharp increase in unemployment claims is fueling concerns about the economic impact of the crisis, with businesses forced to close and lay off workers to comply with social distancing measures. As the number of cases continues to rise across the country, analysts predict that the situation is only going to worsen in the coming weeks. The government is implementing stimulus packages to alleviate the financial strain on individuals and businesses affected by the pandemic, but the long-term effects on the economy remain uncertain.

news.headline: A review praises the GoBoat Fish & Double Fish for a game-changing fishing experience. Tulsa, Okla., March 28, 2025.
news.summary: In Tulsa, Oklahoma on March 28, 2025, an individual shared their excitement about their experience with the GoBoat Fish and GoBoat Double Fish. These innovative watercraft have made a significant impact on the fishing community. Having tested various fishing boats, kayaks, and rafts in the past, the individual was impressed by the unique features of these new products. The GoBoat Fish and GoBoat Double Fish offer a revolutionary fishing experience, and their popularity is on the rise. The individual's firsthand account highlights the growing interest in these watercraft, with the potential for increased adoption among fishing enthusiasts.

news.headline: Crypto market cycle permanently shifted — Polygon founder
news.summary: The traditional four-year cycle in the crypto market is becoming less pronounced due to the maturation of crypto as an asset class and the involvement of institutional investors. The overall speculative activity in the market has decreased because of high interest rates in the United States and low liquidity conditions. However, Polygon co-founder Sandeep Nailwal believes that once interest rates are cut and the Trump administration stabilizes, speculative activity will rebound. Despite the expectation of 30-40% drawdowns between cycles, Nailwal anticipates that drawdowns will be less severe for Blue Chip crypto assets in the future. The disruption of the four-year cycle also stems from US President Donald Trump's pro-crypto policies, including the establishment of a Bitcoin strategic reserve, which has legitimized crypto for institutional investors. Factors such as the rise of ETFs and macroeconomic pressures are further altering market cycles by propping up digital asset prices and keeping capital tied to certain investment vehicles. These shifts suggest a changing landscape in the crypto market dynamics, where greater maturity and stability may be observed in the future.

news.summary: Three co-founders of BitMEX, Arthur Hayes, Benjamin Delo, and Samuel Reed, have received presidential pardons from President Trump. The pardons were granted as reported, in a recent development.

news.headline: ZA Miner offers free cloud mining for Bitcoin, Dogecoin, and Litecoin to earn passive income in 2025.
news.summary: ZA Miner is a cloud mining company based in Middlesex, UK, established in 2020. They offer services in Bitcoin, Dogecoin, and Litecoin mining without the need for expensive hardware investments. Their approach aligns with Donald Trump's pro-mining stance, focusing on economic empowerment and innovation in the crypto sector. ZA Miner leverages state-of-the-art mining facilities in energy-rich regions like Kazakhstan and Iceland. This enables users to earn passive income through mining while staying aligned with global trends and policies supporting cryptocurrency growth.

news.headline: Trump's 25% auto tariffs cause market turmoil, Fed sees inflation surge. GM, Ford stocks plummet. Tesla up.
news.summary: Market sentiment took a significant hit towards the end of the week following President Donald Trump's decision to impose hefty tariffs on imported cars. The White House announced a 25% tariff on auto imports with reciprocal tariffs set to be revealed soon, citing national security concerns as the rationale. This move also potentially includes auto parts being targeted by May. The automotive sector felt the impact immediately, with major Michigan-based companies General Motors Co. and Ford Motor Co. seeing notable declines in response. Conversely, Tesla Inc. seemed to weather the storm better. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: HilleVax discloses 2024 fiscal stats and highlights recent company advancements.
news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the nationwide unemployment rate has decreased to 3.5%, reflecting a positive trend in the job market. The economy has added 200,000 new jobs in sectors such as technology, healthcare, and manufacturing. The stock market also saw a notable increase, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average rising by 2.5% to reach 30,000 points. Additionally, the GDP growth for the third quarter has been revised to 4.2%, indicating a strong economic recovery. These numbers showcase an encouraging outlook for the country's financial situation amidst ongoing uncertainties.

news.headline: RGC Resources, Inc. declares $0.2075 quarterly dividend per share on common stock, 324th consecutive cash dividend.
news.summary: The Board of Directors at RGC Resources, Inc. (NASDAQ: RGCO) based in Roanoke, Va., has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.2075 per share for its common stock. Shareholders of record on April 17, 2025, will receive the dividend on May 1, 2025. This marks the company's 324th consecutive quarterly cash dividend.

news.headline: Markets down, Dow & S&P 500 fall Friday. Nvidia-backed CoreWeave debuts. Live coverage on Investor's Business Daily.

A new addition to the market was seen today as CoreWeave, supported by Nvidia, began trading. The Nasdaq also showed a sell-off trend. The latest market update did not provide further details on the extent of the losses or gains, urging caution in trading decisions.

news.headline: Stock market down due to Trump tariffs, Tesla deliveries awaited. Auto tariffs and inflation data affected markets.Symbols: Dow Jones, TeslaNumbers: Tariffs, Tesla deliveries
news.summary: Stocks experienced a decline throughout the week due to concerns over automobile tariffs and increasing inflation rates. The Dow Jones Futures were particularly affected by additional tariffs imposed by the Trump administration, leading to a negative impact on the overall stock market. Furthermore, attention is now focused on upcoming Tesla deliveries. This ongoing trend raises significant apprehension within the investment community regarding future market performance.

news.summary: AURORA, Ontario, today, Magna International Inc. disclosed the release of its 2024 Annual Report, along with its Management’s Discussion and Analysis and Audited Consolidated Financial Statements, Annual Information Form (AIF), and Form 40-F. These documents can now be accessed on the company’s official website, www.magna.com. Additionally, Magna has submitted these materials to the Canadian Securities Administrators (available through www.sedarplus.ca) and the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (accessible through www.sec.gov/edgar). Magna International Inc. is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: MG) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: MGA).

news.headline: Mawson Infrastructure Group Inc. releases FY2024 financial report with key numbers.
Expo Experts launches Clearance Match to connect employers with security cleared talent, reducing costs and challenges.
news.summary: Expo Experts, a division of TalentAlly based in Chicago, made an announcement on March 28, 2025, unveiling a new product called Clearance Match. This innovative product aims to streamline the hiring process for security cleared individuals by connecting employers with candidates who possess active security clearance and a minimum of 2 years of post-education work experience. By leveraging this platform, companies can significantly reduce costs and logistical hurdles associated with recruiting individuals with security clearance.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency prices plunge due to inflation fears:- Bitcoin: $83,620.45 (-4.3%)- Ethereum: $1,879.34 (-6.7%)- XRP: $2.17 (-7.4%)- Dogecoin: $0.1798 (-6.3%)- Notable liquidations: 149,848 traders for $443.51 million.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets experienced a significant decline on Friday due to renewed concerns about inflation. Prices for major cryptocurrencies plummeted: Bitcoin fell by 4.3% to $83,620.45, Ethereum dropped by 6.7% to $1,879.34, Solana decreased by 7.1% to $129.23, XRP lost 7.4% at $2.17, Dogecoin was down by 6.3% to $0.1798, and Shiba Inu dipped by 6.6% to $0.00001320. Notable statistics include a 4.9% decrease in large transaction volumes, a 2.6% increase in daily active addresses, a drop in transactions over $100,000 from 9,796 to 8,936 in a day, and a 61.5% decrease in exchange netflows. Coinglass data reveals that 149,848 traders were liquidated in the past day, amounting to $443.51 million. In notable developments, Trump's SEC Pick Paul Atkins expressed intent to focus on rational crypto regulations, contrasting with Gary Gensler's approach. Additionally, Galaxy Digital is set to pay $200 million in a Terra-LUNA settlement with New York. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: KB Home opens new community Monteverdi in Horsethief Canyon, Corona, CA with modern homes for sale. $KBH #RealEstate

The homes cater to modern living preferences, boasting contemporary kitchens connected to spacious great rooms, bedroom suites with walk-in closets, and generous storage. The Monteverdi community offers a mix of one- and two-story houses, demonstrating KB Home's renowned quality as one of the leading U.S. homebuilders. This addition aligns with KB Home's focus on constructing residences that cater to current lifestyle needs in a desirable location.

news.headline: Traws Pharma CEO to retire, new interim CEO appointed, effective on March 31, 2025 after filing Form 10-K. Iain Dukes to take over.
news.summary: Traws Pharma, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol TRAW, based in Newtown, Pennsylvania, declared the retirement of Werner Cautreels, PhD, as Chief Executive Officer effective March 31, 2025, following the submission of the Annual Report on Form 10-K to the SEC. Iain D. Dukes, D Phil, will take over as the Interim CEO while retaining his position as Chairman of Traws. The company specializes in developing innovative therapies to combat respiratory viral diseases, an area crucial for human health.

news.headline: Metropolitan Water District assures reliable water supply for SoCal despite dry winter, thanks to snowfall in the Sierra.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, the General Manager of Metropolitan Water District, Deven Upadhyay, has released a statement regarding the California Department of Water Resources’ fourth snow survey. Despite Southern California experiencing a dry winter, reliable water supplies are ensured this year due to significant snowfall in the northern Sierra region. Metropolitan's involvement in the State Water Project enables the region to access water generated from this snowpack. The statement highlights that Southern California will have ample water resources despite the dry season.

news.headline: NJ regulator directs Robinhood and Kalshi to cease sports betting services for residents, voiding current wagers.
news.summary: On Thursday, state regulators mandated that companies close their sports-related services for New Jersey residents and cancel any current bets placed by locals.
